title: Southern Bandomeer Consolidated
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Southern Bandomeer Consolidated''' was a group of ice-mining operations located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] which were owned and operated by the [[Sub-70 Ice Mines]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
